headlines.title: Fox will buy streaming giant Roku for $22 billion
headlines.description: Fox Corporation plans to buy video streaming giant Roku, along with its namesake channel and customer data, in a deal worth a total of $25 billion.

headlines.title: Oil prices fall on Iran deal, but whether they go much lower ‘is highly questionable’
headlines.description: Energy prices tumbled and stocks jumped Monday — but only moderately — after the U.S. and Iran said they had reached a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Map: See how gas prices have changed in the county where you live
headlines.description: How much gas prices have increased during the Iran war depends entirely on where you live, an NBC News analysis of average gas price data from AAA shows.

headlines.title: How to Save on Summer Vacation Season Without Sacrificing Fun
headlines.description: Summer vacation season is here, with nearly half the country planning a trip so financial expert Haley Sacks, known as Mrs. Dow Jones on social media, stops by TODAY with ways to save money on summer travel — without sacrificing any of the fun! Tips include maximizing credit card perks, steering clear of hidden costs, eating like a local, and more.

headlines.title: Elon Musk’s Trillionaire Status Signals Growing Wealth Gap in US
headlines.description: Elon Musk became the world’s first trillionaire after his SpaceX company went public. The record-shattering IPO boosted the stock market and instantly minted a new class of billionaires when just days before, a new report showed inflation at its highest point in the United States in three years. NBC’s Allie Canal reports in this week’s Sunday Focus.

headlines.title: SpaceX sets IPO price at $135
headlines.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX will begin trading with a price set at $135 per share, giving the company a valuation of $1.77 trillion and making it the largest-ever stock debut. NBC News’ Allie Canal explains.

headlines.title: Recent Graduates Say AI is Taking Away Key Entry-Level Jobs
headlines.description: The newest crop of graduates is facing a tough job market and many of them are placing the blame on artificial intelligence, saying the technology is taking away those key entry-level positions. But experts say AI can’t be blamed for all the job losses in the United States. NBC’s Kate Snow reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan sees clues to the U.S. consumer in the pet food aisle
headlines.description: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan is one of few people who really know in real time how Americans are contending with rising inflation and high gas prices.

headlines.title: Meet the regular people making money off SpaceX’s IPO — from a few bucks to a few million
headlines.description: The record-setting SpaceX IPO made Elon Musk a trillionaire. It also paid off for Daniella Rodriguez and millions of other retail investors who had stock.

headlines.title: DOJ approves Paramount Skydance’s acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery
headlines.description: The Justice Department has signed off on Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, a person familiar with the matter told NBC News.
